summary: Well-engineered script and workflow. Type hints, explicit validation, semantic exit codes (2 for validation errors), proper action pinning (actions/checkout@v4), and minimal permissions. Script logic correctly mirrors GitHub Actions semantics (includes/excludes). Minor issues: workflow relies on external config.json fixture staging (acknowledged in comments but not self-contained); error summary grep for 'matrix has [0-9]+ combinations' in errors.txt is brittle if message changes; no explicit Python version pinning. All core logic is sound and testable. Would ship.
